text: I choose you. And I'll choose you over and over and over. Without pause, without a doubt, in a heartbeat.
You are my sun, my moon, and all my stars.
In all the world, there is no heart for me like yours. In all the world, there is no love for you like mine.
Every love story is beautiful, but ours is my favorite.
You make ordinary moments feel extraordinary.
My favorite place is inside your arms.
You are the poem I never knew how to write and this life is the story I've always wanted to tell.
I love you more than yesterday, but less than tomorrow.
With you, I am home — no matter where we are.
You are my today and all of my tomorrows.
If I had to choose between breathing and loving you… I would use my last breath to tell you I love you.
You are the finest, loveliest, tenderest, and most beautiful person I have ever known.
My heart is and always will be yours.
I look at you and see the rest of my life in front of my eyes.
You stole my heart, but I’ll let you keep it.
I love you not only for what you are, but for what I am when I am with you.
You are my forever — in every lifetime, in every version of me.
Every time I see you, I fall in love all over again.
You are the reason my heart beats louder than my fears.
I want to be your favorite hello and your hardest goodbye.
You’re not just my love — you’re my safe place.
Loving you is like breathing — I don’t even have to think about it.
You are the dream I never want to wake up from.
My soul recognized yours long before my eyes did.
You make my heart smile in ways I never knew possible.
I didn’t choose you once — I keep choosing you every single day.
Your love feels like coming home after a lifetime away.
You are my always, my forever, my everything.
In your eyes I found my favorite view.
You are the heartbeat I never knew I was missing.
I love you in every language, in every lifetime, in every universe.
You are my favorite notification in a world full of noise.
My heart knew it was you before my mind caught up.
You are the calm in my chaos and the fire in my soul.
I want all of you — your flaws, your mornings, your late nights, your everything.
You’re the kind of love people write songs about.
Every love song suddenly makes sense because of you.
You are my person — today, tomorrow, always.
I fall for you a little more every time you smile.
You’re not my other half — you’re my whole heart.
I love you more than coffee in the morning — and that’s saying something.
Your love is my favorite kind of magic.
You are the reason I believe in forever.
I want to grow old with you — laughing at the same jokes, holding the same hands.
You make my heart do stupid happy dances.
You are my favorite chapter in the book of my life.
Loving you feels like the easiest and bravest thing I’ve ever done.
You are my soft place to land and my wildest adventure.
My heart whispers your name every time it beats.
You are the beautiful answer to every question my soul ever asked.
I could spend forever in the space between your arms.
You’re the kind of beautiful that makes time stop.
I love you bigger than the sky and deeper than the ocean.
You are my favorite kind of forever.
With you, every moment feels like poetry.
You’re the warmth I feel even when the world is cold.
My heart is happiest when it’s next to yours.
You are the love story I’ll tell my grandchildren about.
I want to wake up to you for the rest of my mornings.
You make every ordinary day feel like Valentine’s Day.
Your love is the home I never want to leave.
I didn’t know what love was until you showed me.
You are my favorite reason to smile.
Every beat of my heart has your name written on it.
You are the miracle I never stopped praying for.
Loving you is my favorite habit.
You are the light that guides me through every darkness.
I choose you today, tomorrow, and every day after.
Your smile is my favorite sunrise.
You make my soul feel safe and wild at the same time.
I love you more than words have the power to say.
You are my favorite place to go when my mind searches for peace.
In your arms is where I belong — always.
You are the love I never knew I was searching for.
My heart says your name like a prayer.
You are my once in a lifetime kind of love.
I want to hold your hand in every lifetime.
You make my heart feel full even on empty days.
You are the reason my soul feels alive.
Loving you is the best decision my heart ever made.
You are my favorite kind of beautiful chaos.
Every love song reminds me of your voice.
You are the missing piece I never knew was gone.
I love you in colors the world has never seen.
You are my forever kind of feeling.
Your love feels like poetry written just for me.
I want to be the reason you believe in love again and again.
You are my heart’s favorite place to stay.
With you, even silence feels romantic.
You are the love I want to come home to every day.
My soul chose you before I even knew what love was.
You make every version of me better.
I love you more with every sunrise we share.
You are the gentle in my storm.
Your love is my favorite fairytale.
I want to write our story in the stars.
You are my always and my infinity.
Every time you laugh, my heart collects another reason to love you.
You are the calm I never knew I needed.
I choose you — today, tomorrow, forever, endlessly.
You are my favorite daydream and my sweetest reality.
Loving you feels like the most natural thing in the world.
You are the heartbeat behind every happy tear I’ve cried.
My love for you grows bigger than the distance between us.
You are my favorite hello every single morning.
In your eyes I see every tomorrow I ever want.
You make my heart believe in magic again.
I love you in ways words will never be enough for.
You are the home my soul always returns to.
Every moment with you feels like stealing time from forever.
You are my favorite kind of beautiful trouble.
I want to love you loudly and softly — every way possible.
You are the reason my heart learned how to hope again.
Your love is the safest place I’ve ever known.
I love you more than all the stars we haven’t counted yet.
You are my favorite good morning and my sweetest good night.
My heart beats your name like a love song on repeat.
You are the love I never thought I deserved — but always needed.
With you, forever doesn’t feel long enough.
You are my favorite reason to believe in soulmates.
I want to hold you until the stars fall out of the sky.
You make every broken piece of me feel whole.
Your love is the melody my heart keeps humming.
You are my wildest dream wrapped in the softest reality.
I love you in every quiet moment and every loud heartbeat.
You are the love story I’ll never stop telling.
My favorite place is wherever you are.
You make my soul feel like it’s finally home.
I choose you in this life and every one after.
You are the gentle fire that warms my entire world.
Loving you is my favorite kind of bravery.
You are the reason my heart smiles even on tough days.
I want to love you until the end of every forever.
You are my favorite kind of magic and miracle.
Every part of me loves every part of you.
You are the love I waited lifetimes for.
My heart is yours — completely, endlessly, irrevocably.
You make time feel slower and love feel infinite.
I love you more than all the words in every language.
You are my favorite forever kind of feeling.
Your love is the only place I never want to leave.
You are the heartbeat I want to fall asleep to every night.
I want to be the reason you never stop smiling.
You are my always in a world full of sometimes.
Loving you feels like flying without fear of falling.
You are the poem my heart keeps writing every day.
I love you in colors no one else can see.
You are my favorite good morning text and my last good night thought.
My soul knew you before my heart caught up.
You make every season feel like spring.
I want to love you until the stars forget how to shine.
You are the love I never knew how to dream about.
Every time I look at you, my heart says yes again.
You are my favorite place to rest my soul.
I love you more than the quiet between heartbeats.
You are the reason forever feels too short.
My heart is yours — signed, sealed, forever yours.
You make every ordinary second feel sacred.
I choose you — in every universe, every timeline, every version of reality.
You are the love song my heart sings when no one is listening.
Loving you is the easiest thing I’ve ever done right.
You are my favorite reason to believe in miracles.
I want to hold your hand through every sunrise and every storm.
You are the home I carry in my chest.
My love for you is bigger than distance, time, and words.
You are the gentle chaos my heart craves.
I love you in every language my soul speaks.
You are my favorite kind of always.
Every part of my day is better because you exist.
You are the love I want to grow old and silly with.
My heart chose you before logic had a chance.
You make my soul feel safe enough to be vulnerable.
I want to love you until the end of every possible forever.
You are my favorite kind of beautiful madness.
Loving you feels like coming home to myself.
You are the reason my heart learned how to hope again.
I love you more than all the quiet nights and loud mornings combined.
You are my favorite place to lose myself in.
My soul says your name like it’s coming home.
You are the love I never want to stop falling for.
Every heartbeat carries your name like a promise.
You make every version of tomorrow feel exciting.
I want to be the one who makes you believe in forever again.
You are my favorite reason the universe conspired.
Loving you is the sweetest rebellion against logic.
You are the gentle wildfire burning inside my soul.
I love you in ways even poetry can’t capture.
You are my always — no matter the season, no matter the storm.
My heart is happiest when it’s tangled up in yours.
You are the love I want to keep choosing every single day.
I want to spend forever making you smile.
You are my favorite kind of forever feeling.
Loving you feels like the most beautiful accident.
You are the reason my soul finally feels complete.
I love you more than all the stars we still haven’t named.
You are my favorite place to rest and my favorite place to run wild.
Every part of me says yes to every part of you.
You are the love story written across my entire lifetime.
I choose you — over and over, endlessly, without hesitation.
You are my heart’s home, my soul’s peace, and my forever love.
